relationships.Loen: patrol partner whose woodland instincts she trusts
relationships.Nicole: accepts village contracts from her but dislikes council politics
relationships.Sanji: a close friend whose meals she quietly looks forward to

extra.conflict: the effort to protect Suntail Village from creatures moving down from the mountains
extra.secret: She fled an arranged noble marriage and hides her family name from visiting officials

relationships.Loen: collects rare herbs with her beyond the village boundary
relationships.Nicole: supplies remedies for the village clinic and respects her judgment
relationships.Frederica: enjoys her songs but suspects the lyrics contain hidden meanings

extra.conflict: a strange blight spreading through medicinal plants near the mountain trail
extra.secret: She keeps one blighted plant alive because it reacts to an old pendant left by her mother

relationships.Asuna: trusted patrol partner who handles direct confrontation
relationships.Lanyan: guides her safely while gathering herbs in the forest
relationships.Nicole: reports tracks and threats to her, though she withholds one discovery

extra.location: the eastern watch trail and forest edge
extra.conflict: the appearance of unnatural tracks around abandoned mountain shrines
extra.secret: She found signs that someone inside the village is feeding the mountain creatures

relationships.Nicole: performs at village events in exchange for lodging and information
relationships.Lanyan: a sincere friend who listens closely to every new ballad
relationships.Sanji: trades songs and gossip for experimental dishes after closing time

extra.location: the market square stage and Lantern Kitchen
extra.conflict: a covert struggle over who controls the mountain trade road
extra.secret: Her newest ballads carry coded warnings between settlements threatened by the same hidden faction

relationships.Asuna: relies on her to reinforce the village watch during emergencies
relationships.Loen: trusts her field reports but senses that the ranger is withholding something
relationships.Sanji: uses his kitchen as an informal meeting place and source of local news

extra.location: the council office overlooking the market square
extra.conflict: the need to keep the village united while mountain threats and trade disputes intensify
extra.secret: She discovered that several council payments were redirected to an unknown group beyond the mountains

relationships.Nicole: runs the village kitchen under her license and passes along useful tavern gossip
relationships.Asuna: keeps a meal warm whenever she returns late from patrol
relationships.Frederica: tests new recipes on her in return for songs and news from the road

extra.location: Lantern Kitchen beside the market square
extra.conflict: shortages caused by attacks on supply caravans along the mountain road
extra.secret: He recognizes the mark left on attacked caravans from the merchant family he ran away from
